evidence_gaps: No openalex hits returned; crossref year fields are null, so recency assessment is incomplete.
Raw output contains no published benchmark paper dedicated to ship-radiated noise datasets (e.g., DeepShip, ShipEar) — student must locate datasets externally.
No raw entry explicitly introduces a labeled hydrophone-recognition dataset, so `dataset_candidates` is empty.
Several crossref entries lack abstracts, so relevance had to be judged by title and DOI venue only.
